mapper.insert: INSERT INTO child_log (child_id, log_type, content, author_user_id) VALUES (#{childId}, #{logType}, #{content}, #{authorUserId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, child_id, log_type, content, author_user_id, created_at FROM child_log WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, child_id, log_type, content, author_user_id, created_at FROM child_log WHERE child_id = #{childId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, child_id, log_type, content, author_user_id, created_at FROM child_log WHERE child_id = #{childId} AND log_type = #{logType} ORDER BY id DESC
